headline: Edgewater Research Upgrade AppLovin Corporation (APP)
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is among the Best Fundamental Stocks. On June 5, Edgewater Research upgraded AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) to Outperform from Neutral. Separately, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) announced that its advertising platform is now open to all advertisers. It has eliminated the referral code requirement introduced when its self-serve platform launched last October. Chief Executive Officer Adam […]
